summary: WebRTC stability fixes fully verified. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Fixed test file to use dynamic active meeting IDs instead of hardcoded ended meeting ID. WebSocket signaling endpoint confirmed working. Frontend: VideoMeetingsPage loads with meeting list, Create Meeting dialog works end-to-end, Video Room lobby loads with correct 'No device' state in preview environment. All ICE restart handlers, reconnecting badge UI, and screen share improvements confirmed in code review.

minor.issue: WebSocket close() called before accept() for 'Meeting ended' and 'Meeting not found' cases. FastAPI returns HTTP 403 instead of proper WebSocket close code (4001/4004). Frontend handles this via ws.onerror toast, which is acceptable UX but hides the specific reason.

issues: Join Meeting button label does not change when mediaState='not_found' (stays as 'Join Meeting' instead of something like 'Retry / Audio Only'). The 'audio_only' case correctly shows 'Join Meeting (Audio Only)' but 'not_found' does not have a specific label. Minor UX issue - error toast provides sufficient feedback.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix WS close code - call websocket.accept() before websocket.close() in video_rooms_routes.py for proper WS close codes (4001/4004) on invalid meetings. Currently returns HTTP 403.
OPTIONAL: Update Join Meeting button label for mediaState='not_found' to give a more specific hint
critical_code_review_comments: ICE restart logic (oniceconnectionstatechange line 174): CONFIRMED - 'disconnected' waits 4s before sending iceRestart offer; 'failed' immediately sends iceRestart offer
onnegotiationneeded safety net (line 225): CONFIRMED - guards role='host', WS open, signalingState='stable' before creating offer
Screen share for audio-only join (line 435-438): CONFIRMED - uses addTrack to create new video sender when no video sender exists; onnegotiationneeded triggers renegotiation
Reconnecting badge UI (line 707-714): CONFIRMED - iceStatus='reconnecting' shows amber pulsing badge; iceStatus='failed' shows red badge. Both wired to iceStatus state variable
Reconnecting overlay on remote video (line 745): CONFIRMED - shows Loader2 spinner and 'Reconnecting...' text when iceStatus='reconnecting'
4 STUN servers (stun.l.google.com + stun1 + stun2 + stun3): CONFIRMED
Backend keepalive ping at 120s: CONFIRMED (video_rooms_routes.py line 277-283)
iceRestartTimerRef cleanup in cleanup() at line 136: CONFIRMED
POST /api/video-rooms/meetings has no strict auth (auth optional, role checked only when token present) - noted in iteration_6, still present

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core flows working; minor lobby button label UX issue)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ meetings created during testing: TEST_WS_Active_Meeting, TEST_WS_Active_Session, TEST_WebRTC Telehealth Consultation, TEST_Active Meeting Now, TEST_Scheduled Meeting (x2), TEST_UI_Playwright_Meeting, TEST_WS_Ended_Meeting_Check (ended)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebRTC stability fixes verified. Backend 20/20 tests pass. Key files: VideoRoomPage.js has ICE restart in oniceconnectionstatechange (line 174), onnegotiationneeded safety net (line 225), screen share addTrack for audio-only (line 435-438). Reconnecting UI badge at lines 707-714, 745. Video lobby shows 'No device' in preview environment (expected). WS signaling confirmed working for active meetings. Backend WS close-before-accept issue is minor. Test file fixed: test_webrtc_video_rooms.py now uses active_meeting_id fixture instead of hardcoded ended meeting ID. BASE_URL now loaded from frontend/.env if env var not set.
verified_features: ✅ VideoMeetingsPage /video-meetings loads with data-testid=video-meetings-page
✅ Stats cards show Active/Scheduled, Completed, Total counts correctly
✅ Meeting list with Patient Link, Join as Host, End buttons per row
✅ Create Meeting button (data-testid=create-meeting-btn) opens dialog
✅ Create Meeting dialog has title/duration/phone/notes inputs
✅ Meeting creation submits successfully, dialog closes, list updates
✅ Video Room lobby /video-room/{id}?role=host loads with data-testid=video-lobby
✅ Lobby shows 'Joining as Provider (Host)' badge for role=host
✅ Lobby shows 'No device' media state in preview environment (correct fallback)
✅ Join Meeting button clickable, shows error toast for no camera/mic
✅ Audio/video toggle + retry button present in lobby
✅ ICE restart handlers (oniceconnectionstatechange + onnegotiationneeded) present in VideoRoomPage.js
✅ Reconnecting amber badge wired to iceStatus='reconnecting' in header (line 707)
✅ Connection lost red badge wired to iceStatus='failed' in header (line 713)
✅ Reconnecting overlay on remote video (line 745)
✅ Screen share button data-testid=toggle-screen in active meeting controls
✅ Screen share addTrack for audio-only join (line 437-438)
✅ WebSocket /api/video-rooms/ws/{id}/host connects to active meeting
✅ WebSocket with invalid role rejected (HTTP 403 before accept)
✅ WebSocket to ended meeting rejected
✅ POST /api/video-rooms/meetings creates meeting (engine=webrtc, status=active)
✅ GET /api/video-rooms/meetings returns list
✅ POST join-token returns engine+token+room_id for active meeting
✅ Gemini /api/gemini/diagnose returns structured diagnosis
✅ Frontend keepalive ping every 10s, backend ping at 120s
✅ iceRestartTimerRef properly cleaned up in cleanup()
✅ 4 STUN servers (stun.l.google.com stun1 stun2 stun3) + TURN configured
✅ iceCandidatePoolSize=10
